item.title: Some resources
item.description: A living list of things I find genuinely useful — templates, tools, links, and questions.

item.title: About me
item.description: Contact me Originally from Toulouse, France, I currently live in Geneva, Switzerland. I design programs, convenings, and experimental formats for impact-focused communities — currently as **Programs & Initiatives Lead at **Effective Altruism France, and through freelance and grant-funded work with various communities, e.g. biosecurity professionals. With a background in biomedical engineering, I have worked across biosecurity, AI governance, and community building, previously at the Simon Institute for Longterm Governance (via the Talos Fellowship) and as Co-Director of Effective Altruism Switzerland.

item.title: How I built this website
item.description: This site is built with Hugo and hosted on GitHub Pages. I initially set it up in 2023, and now maintain and update it with the help of AI (Claude Code). Setup Install dependencies Git Hugo Set up a GitHub Pages repo Follow these instructions Create the Hugo site and add a theme Run hugo new site <<your repo name>> --force Download a theme, e.g. Poison If you won’t modify the theme: git clone <<theme-url>> /themes/<<theme name>> If you will make changes: fork the theme repo, then git submodule add <<forked-theme-url>> themes/<<theme-name>> Add content and test locally Edit config.

item.title: Some resources
item.description: A living list of things I find genuinely useful — templates, tools, links, and questions.

item.title: Give me feedback
item.description: This is a place where you can anonymously (or not) give feedback to me. I value your feedback, and I will try my best to implement it. Thank you for participating. Here are some prompts: What do you think is my greatest strenght? my greatest weakness? What do you wish I would do more or less of? Is there something you would like me to learn?
